title: NFTs Hit the Art World in 2021 and Nothing Has Been Quite the Same Since
meta_description: A 2021 retrospective on how NFTs reshaped arts collectives, artist income, and the gallery system. What actually changed, and what didn't.
author: Sophie Chen

title: How the Whitney Biennial 2022 Forced a Real Conversation About Collective Power in American Art
meta_description: The Whitney Biennial 2022 wasn't just an exhibition. It was a referendum on who gets to define American art and who funds it.
author: Sophie Chen

title: How the Sudden Pivot to Virtual Art Fairs in 2020 Reshaped the Collectives Scene Forever
meta_description: A 2020 retrospective on how virtual art fairs and online collectives responded to COVID-19, and what it meant for the future of arts communities.
author: Marcus Reid
